scores.notes: Several OCR errors including 'efficiencyl' instead of 'efficiency', '15261im' instead of '1526 lm', 'vi' instead of 'V', missing spaces in compound words like 'ofcorrosion-resistant', and '5y years' redundancy. Table structure is mostly preserved but some alignment issues. Most numeric values are correct though some formatting is inconsistent. Overall layout and completeness are good with all major sections captured.
